intro: Matthiola tricuspidata, also known as Horned stock or Three-angled stock, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and it is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help in reducing stress and improving overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Matthiola tricuspidata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to support respiratory health and as a natural remedy for coughs and colds.
